health_impact_cpcb: Respiratory effects even on healthy people; serious health impacts on people with lung/heart disease. Health impacts may be experienced even during light physical activity.

texts.en: Air quality in ASHOK VIHAR is SEVERE (AQI 402). Avoid all outdoor activity. Even healthy people may be affected. Seek medical help if you have breathing difficulty.
texts.hi: ASHOK VIHAR की हवा बहुत ज़्यादा खराब है (AQI 402)। बाहर निकलने से बचें। सेहतमंद लोगों को भी दिक्कत हो सकती है। साँस लेने में परेशानी हो तो डॉक्टर को दिखाएँ।

disclaimer: AQI band and health impact are the official CPCB NAQI classification. All languages verified by a speaker of that language.
